parameters.query:
SELECT
    so.order_no,
    so.release_no,
    so.sequence_no,
    so.contract,
    so.part_no,
    rlb.lote,
    so.qty_complete,
    /* Lotes */
    NVL(rlb.numero_de_lotes, 0) AS numero_de_lotes,
    NVL(rlb.reserved_qty, 0)    AS reserved_qty,
    /* Work centers NO OK */
    NVL(wc.num_wc_no_90, 0)     AS num_work_center_no_no_90,
    IFSAPP.Inventory_Putaway_Manager_API.Get_Next_Putaway_Event_Id as Number_
FROM ifsapp.shop_ord so
/* ===========================
   Lotes reservados
   =========================== */
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
        lot_batch_no as LOTE,
        order_ref1 AS order_no,
        order_ref2 AS release_no,
        order_ref3 AS sequence_no,
        COUNT(*) AS numero_de_lotes,
        SUM(reserved_qty) AS reserved_qty
    FROM ifsapp.reserved_lot_batch
    GROUP BY
        order_ref1,
        order_ref2,
        order_ref3,
        lot_batch_no
) rlb
  ON rlb.order_no    = so.order_no
 AND rlb.release_no  = so.release_no
 AND rlb.sequence_no = so.sequence_no
/* ===========================
   Work centers con estado ≠ 90
   =========================== */
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
        order_no,
        release_no,
        sequence_no,
        COUNT(*) AS num_wc_no_90
    FROM ifsapp.shop_order_operation
    WHERE oper_status_code_db <> 90
    GROUP BY
        order_no,
        release_no,
        sequence_no
) wc
  ON wc.order_no    = so.order_no
 AND wc.release_no  = so.release_no
 AND wc.sequence_no = so.sequence_no
WHERE so.contract = 'AMO'
  AND so.state = 'Started'
  AND so.part_no <> 'COMBIITEM'
  AND so.qty_complete = 0
  /* LAB = 90 */
  AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM ifsapp.shop_order_operation op
        WHERE op.order_no = so.order_no
          AND op.release_no = so.release_no
          AND op.sequence_no = so.sequence_no
          AND op.work_center_no = 'LAB'
          AND op.oper_status_code_db = 90
      )
  /* QINSP = 90 */
  AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM ifsapp.shop_order_operation op
        WHERE op.order_no = so.order_no
          AND op.release_no = so.release_no
          AND op.sequence_no = so.sequence_no
          AND op.work_center_no = 'QINSP'
          AND op.oper_status_code_db = 90
      )
  /* EMB = 90 ✅ NUEVO */
  AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM ifsapp.shop_order_operation op
        WHERE op.order_no = so.order_no
          AND op.release_no = so.release_no
          AND op.sequence_no = so.sequence_no
          AND op.work_center_no = 'EMB'
          AND op.oper_status_code_db = 90
      )
  /* ❌ Excluir órdenes con SBB% */
  AND NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM ifsapp.shop_order_operation op
        WHERE op.order_no = so.order_no
          AND op.release_no = so.release_no
          AND op.sequence_no = so.sequence_no
          AND op.work_center_no LIKE 'SBB%'
      )

SELECT
    so.order_no,
    so.release_no,
    so.sequence_no,
    so.contract,
    so.part_no,
    so.qty_complete,
    /* Work centers NO OK */
    NVL(wc.num_wc_no_90, 0)     AS num_work_center_no_no_90,
    IFSAPP.Inventory_Putaway_Manager_API.Get_Next_Putaway_Event_Id as Number_
FROM ifsapp.shop_ord so

/* ===========================
   Work centers con estado ≠ 90
   =========================== */
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT
        order_no,
        release_no,
        sequence_no,
        COUNT(*) AS num_wc_no_90
    FROM ifsapp.shop_order_operation
    WHERE oper_status_code_db <> 90
    GROUP BY
        order_no,
        release_no,
        sequence_no
) wc
  ON wc.order_no    = so.order_no
 AND wc.release_no  = so.release_no
 AND wc.sequence_no = so.sequence_no
WHERE so.contract = 'AMO'
  AND so.state = 'Started'
  AND so.part_no <> 'COMBIITEM'

  /* LAB = 90 */
  AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM ifsapp.shop_order_operation op
        WHERE op.order_no = so.order_no
          AND op.release_no = so.release_no
          AND op.sequence_no = so.sequence_no
          AND op.work_center_no = 'LAB'
          AND op.oper_status_code_db = 90
      )
  /* QINSP = 90 */
  AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM ifsapp.shop_order_operation op
        WHERE op.order_no = so.order_no
          AND op.release_no = so.release_no
          AND op.sequence_no = so.sequence_no
          AND op.work_center_no = 'QINSP'
          AND op.oper_status_code_db = 90
      )
  /* EMB = 90 ✅ NUEVO */
  AND EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM ifsapp.shop_order_operation op
        WHERE op.order_no = so.order_no
          AND op.release_no = so.release_no
          AND op.sequence_no = so.sequence_no
          AND op.work_center_no = 'EMB'
          AND op.oper_status_code_db = 90
      )
  /* ❌ Excluir órdenes con SBB% */
  AND NOT EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM ifsapp.shop_order_operation op
        WHERE op.order_no = so.order_no
          AND op.release_no = so.release_no
          AND op.sequence_no = so.sequence_no
          AND op.work_center_no LIKE 'SBB%'
      )
